title: Immutable official-source capture and versioning (exact HTML/PDF bytes, content-addressable storage, change detection; NO semantic OCR/extraction)
objective: PROPOSED — NOT CONTRACTED (owner approval required to move backlog -> ready). NARROWED (owner directive 2026-07-23 five-packet split): capture and preserve official sources IMMUTABLY — this task performs NO semantic OCR decision and NO final legal extraction (that is M3-T003). Scope: download and preserve EXACT official HTML/PDF bytes; content-addressable storage; SHA-256 (raw + normalized-layout-only); retrieval metadata (publisher, authority tier, canonical URL, timestamp, HTTP status + response metadata); source/version/change detection; HTML page capture; PDF page count, PDF document metadata (rotation/crop box/media box/DPI where present), and rendered-page derivatives (page images + their hashes). MULTI-SIGNAL version detection: a changed section hash, changed Last-Amended, a new /recently-adopted amendment-feed entry, a newly adopted instrument, or a changed official PDF MUST raise a candidate corpus version even when the homepage currency banner is UNCHANGED; an unchanged banner NEVER suppresses a detected change. Store bulk raw HTML/PDF + rendered pages content-addressably in approved cloud object storage; deduplicate by hash; never overwrite an old version; NEVER commit a citywide corpus or leave bulk temp data on the owner PC. Every PDF is treated as UNTRUSTED (§ security controls). FIXTURE-vs-PRODUCTION: fixture/harness increments may be gate-reviewed while B-001 blocks durable storage, but this task does NOT reach 'accepted', does NOT mark the ZR corpus domain 'implemented', and does NOT satisfy downstream (M3-T003/M3-T004) dependencies until durable content-addressed official captures exist (enforced by B-001). NOTE: any PDF library needed for page-count/metadata/render is SELECTED in M3-T003's /dependency-security pass, NOT chosen here; HTML capture + byte preservation + hashing + versioning need no new dependency and proceed first (see report §2/§10 sequencing note). Live-source smoke tests are SEPARATE from deterministic CI. Full spec: project-control/reports/M3-CORPUS-REPLAN-PROPOSAL.md.
business_reason: An immutable, hash-addressed, versioned capture of the exact official bytes is the provenance floor every downstream stage (evidence verification, closure, rules) inherits from. Splitting capture from extraction keeps the trust boundary clean: nothing here interprets a document, so no OCR/parse choice can silently taint provenance.
inputs: M3-T001 accepted: SOURCE_AUTHORITY_POLICY.md (tier assignment + provenance-vs-precedence), LEGAL_CORPUS_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md (domain mapping), legal_source_manifest schema (record shape), DOCUMENT_EVIDENCE_POLICY.md (capture is 'raw_captured', not extraction), authoritative status vocabulary

docs/SOURCE_ACCESS_REGISTRY.md section 8 — ZR portal: HTML tree, /recently-adopted feed, /zr-downloads dated PDFs, per-article/chapter PDFs; API surface ABSENT; homepage banner; per-section Last Amended; 504 on the oversized 12-10 node (low-rate, resumable)
services/api/app/resilience/transport.py (M2-T011) — bounded HTTP, Retry-After, breaker, budget: REUSE, do not fork
services/api/app/_zr_snapshots/v1/*.snapshot.json + sync_zr_snapshots (M4-T005/T006 hand-captured pattern) — interim format this ingestion supersedes/backfills
B-001 (Supabase management token) — gates durable cloud object storage AND this task's acceptance; if unavailable, bounded-fixtures-only engineering path applies
outputs: services/api/app/corpus/ingest/** — fetcher over app.resilience.transport, retrieval-metadata recorder, HTML page capture (OWNED)

services/api/app/corpus/storage/** — content-addressable object-storage adapter (SHA-256 keys, dedupe-by-hash, never-overwrite, private buckets), original HTML/PDF + rendered-page persistence, legal_source_manifest writer (OWNED)

services/api/app/corpus/versioning/** — multi-signal change detector (banner + section hash + Last-Amended + amendment feed + adopted instrument + PDF), candidate-version/reconciliation emitter (OWNED)
services/api/tests/corpus/ingest/**, services/api/tests/corpus/storage/**, services/api/tests/corpus/versioning/** — deterministic capture + versioning tests on frozen fixtures
services/api/tests/fixtures/corpus/capture/** — bounded frozen official HTML/PDF fixtures (NOT a citywide corpus)
infra/ingestion/** — Render worker/cron descriptor (only exercised when durable storage is available)
forbidden_paths: services/api/app/corpus/extractors/**, evidence/**, document_validation/** (owned by M3-T003), closure/** (owned by M3-T004), construction_code/** and overlay/** (owned by M3-T005) — M3-T002 must not create or modify those trees
ANY semantic OCR decision, native text/layout extraction, critical-token detection, or final legal extraction (that is M3-T003) — capture only

Choosing/installing a PDF or OCR library (deferred to M3-T003 /dependency-security); adding requests / browser automation / scraping framework / AI framework; importing httpx in production (dev/test-only)

Committing bulk/citywide raw HTML/PDF/rendered-page corpus into git; leaving bulk temp data on the owner PC; fetching live inside a per-property analysis path; overwriting a prior version; marking the ZR domain 'implemented' on fixtures alone
Any rule publication/Verified labeling; editing canonical contracts; apps/web/**; project-control/** except own reports; .claude/** except own agent-memory
acceptance_preconditions: ACCEPTANCE (not gate-PASS) additionally requires: B-001 resolved; durable content-addressed official captures (HTML + PDF + rendered pages) exist in approved object storage; multi-signal version detection demonstrated against durable captures.

Until then, fixture/harness increments may PASS G0-G5 as an engineering increment but the task stays awaiting_gate/blocked (B-001), is NOT accepted, does NOT mark the ZR domain 'implemented', and does NOT satisfy M3-T003/M3-T004 dependencies.
acceptance_scenarios: AS-1 immutable capture: a frozen fixture source is captured with publisher/tier, canonical URL, retrieval timestamp, HTTP status, raw SHA-256, normalized-layout SHA-256, and (PDF) page count + document metadata (rotation/crop/media box/DPI where present).
AS-2 exact-bytes hash: stored raw bytes reproduce their recorded SHA-256; a single changed byte fails.
AS-3 content-addressable + never-overwrite: identical bytes deduplicate to one object; a changed capture creates a NEW version keyed by its hash; a prior version is never overwritten or deleted.
AS-4 rendered-page derivative provenance: each rendered page image records its page number + image hash + source-document raw hash (rendering uses the M3-T003-selected library; see sequencing note).

AS-5 multi-signal versioning: a changed section hash OR Last-Amended OR amendment-feed entry OR adopted instrument OR official PDF raises a candidate corpus version even with an UNCHANGED homepage banner; and an unchanged banner never suppresses a detected change.
AS-6 fail-closed transport: redirect / unexpected host change / malformed document / schema drift fails closed via app.resilience.transport (no partial silent capture).
AS-7 no extraction here: a test asserts M3-T002 emits NO extracted legal values / no OCR text / no critical-token decisions — only bytes, hashes, metadata, rendered derivatives, and version signals.
AS-8 CI isolation: deterministic CI runs on frozen fixtures; live-source smoke tests are a separate suite and do not gate normal builds.
AS-9 fixture-not-production: with B-001 open, a machine/report check confirms the ZR domain is NOT 'implemented', the task is NOT accepted, and downstream deps are NOT satisfied.
NC-1 no live-in-request: no per-property code path triggers a live fetch.
NC-2 storage honesty: with B-001 open, only bounded fixtures are captured and the report states the durable-storage limitation; no bulk corpus committed or left on the PC.

NC-3 untrusted PDF: a malformed/oversized/encrypted fixture PDF is rejected/limited by the security controls (size/page/stream/time budgets; no JS/attachment/action execution) and never crashes the worker or writes bulk temp files.
risks: PROPOSAL ONLY: no dispatch until owner approves the packet + dependency order.
FIXTURE != PRODUCTION: gate PASS on fixtures is an engineering increment; acceptance (and satisfying downstream deps, and 'implemented') requires durable captures — enforced by B-001 in blockers[].
TRUST BOUNDARY: this task captures, it does not interpret; NO OCR/extraction here so no parse choice taints provenance. Extraction + its dependencies belong to M3-T003.

SEQUENCING NOTE: PDF page-count/metadata/render need the library selected in M3-T003 /dependency-security; that PDF-derivative sub-capability is sequenced after that selection. HTML capture + hashing + versioning need no new dependency and proceed first. (Flagged for owner confirmation in the return.)

SECURITY: every PDF (incl. government-hosted) is untrusted — MIME/signature validation, size/page/stream/image/time budgets, sandboxed worker, no PDF JS/attachment/action execution, crash isolation, no path traversal, private storage, log redaction (G5).
THIN CLIENT: no bulk corpus in git or on the owner PC; bulk storage on cloud object storage via a Render worker.
requirement_refs: project-control/reports/M3-CORPUS-REPLAN-PROPOSAL.md — full spec (owner directive 2026-07-23 five-packet split, sections 2 M3-T002, 7 cross-source, 12 security, 13 storage)
harness_assignments: IMMUTABLE-CAPTURE + VERSION-CHANGE-DETECTION HARNESS: exact-bytes hash reproduces / changed bytes fail; content-addressable dedupe + never-overwrite; multi-signal version detection (banner is one signal; hash/Last-Amended/feed/instrument/PDF each raise a candidate version; unchanged banner never suppresses); fail-closed transport; untrusted-PDF security limits.
The SOURCE-FIDELITY replay + HTML-vs-PDF-critical-conflict + extraction harnesses move to M3-T003 (they require extraction, which lives there).
LIVE-SOURCE SMOKE TESTS: separate from deterministic CI.
